app.name: Essenly
app.tagline: Your AI K-Beauty Guide in Korea

landing.title: Discover K-Beauty, Tailored to You
landing.subtitle: AI-powered recommendations for skincare, treatments, and more — personalized to your skin type, concerns, and travel plans.
landing.pathADescription: Chat with our AI guide and get instant recommendations
landing.pathBDescription: Answer a few quick questions first for personalized picks
landing.ctaDescription: Chat with our AI guide — no signup needed
landing.step1Desc: Tell us what you're looking for — our AI finds the best picks instantly
landing.step2Desc: Our AI finds the best products, clinics, and treatments for your unique profile
landing.step3Desc: Every recommendation comes with map links and booking options — ready to go
landing.benefitProductsDesc: Skincare & beauty products picked for your skin type
landing.benefitMapDesc: Direct links to navigate and reserve
landing.benefitKitDesc: A personalized starter kit matched to your profile
landing.trustSubtitle: Essenly is free to use. No signup, no tracking, no data selling.
landing.trustNoShareDesc: Your data stays between you and AI
landing.returnDescription: Your beauty profile is ready. Pick up where you left off.

onboarding.heading: Tell me about you
onboarding.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

chat.greeting: Hi! I'm your K-Beauty guide in Seoul. Ask me anything, or tell me about yourself for better picks.
chat.suggestedQ1: What skincare products are good for my skin type?
chat.suggestedQ3: I want a facial treatment with no downtime
chat.errorRetry: Something went wrong. Tap to retry.
chat.rateLimited: Please wait a moment before sending another message.

consent.consentNotice: We'll store your beauty profile to personalize recommendations. Data is auto-deleted after 90 days of inactivity.

kit.title: Get your personalized K-Beauty Starter Kit
kit.subtitle: Matched to your skin & hair type. Delivered to your hotel in Seoul.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
error.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
